author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyPulse
short: Comprehensive health monitoring for bot, services, and cogs
description: Backend health monitoring for bot health (latency, uptime), external HTTP services, and other cogs. Captures command exceptions backend-side with traceback snapshots, marks erroring cogs as Degraded, and can auto-reload cogs that are unloaded or erroring. Features a dashboard, alert channel, and error history.
install_msg:
ShadyPulse installed!

Commands:
- `[p]pulse` - Health dashboard
- `[p]uptime` - Bot uptime
- `[p]shadypulse` (alias `[p]sp`) - Open the control panel (Owner)

Everything is configured from the `[p]shadypulse` panel:
- 🔌 Cogs - add cogs to monitor from a dropdown of loaded cogs
- 🔔 Alerts - set the alert channel, toggle error alerts
- 🔄 Toggle Auto-Reload, ⚙️ Settings, 🌐 HTTP, ⚠️ Errors

No subcommands to remember.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores service status history and configuration. No user data is collected.
